The pod-specific subdomain returned by the /id discovery call.

Oracle Eloqua REST APIs for the Oracle Marketing B2B marketing
automation platform. Two API surfaces are covered:

- The **Application API** at `/api/rest/2.0/` for managing assets and
  data (contacts, accounts, campaigns, emails, forms, custom objects).
- The **Bulk API** at `/api/bulk/2.0/` for high-volume imports,
  exports, and sync operations.

Both surfaces share the same authentication. The base URL is
pod-specific and resolved at runtime per customer from the
`https://login.eloqua.com/id` discovery endpoint. Authentication is
OAuth 2.0 Bearer tokens (Authorization Code, Implicit, or Resource
Owner Password grants) or HTTP Basic Authentication using
`client_id:client_secret`.


Contact Support:
 Name: Oracle Eloqua
